name: Change of Places Left to Right
preceding_figure_names: American Spin, Change of Hands Behind Back, Change of Places Right to Left, Chugging, Fallaway Throwaway, Hip Bump, Miami Special, Rolling Off the Arm, Shoulder Spin, Simple Spin, Spanish Arms, Stop and Go, Whip Throwaway, Windmill
following_figure_names: Chugging, Toe Heel Swivels, Hip Bump, Link, American Spin, Stop and Go, Windmill, Spanish Arms, Rolling Off the Arm, Simple Spin, Stalking Walks, Flicks and Break, Miami Special, Shoulder Spin, Catapult
notes:
Variation - Change of hands: 2 options
Start with R-to-R hand hold. Man leads lady to start turn L on step 3, then release R hand hold. Take L to R hand hold at the end of lady's turn.
Same as table above or option 1, except that at the end, take R-to-R hand hold.
Development: Overturned Change of Places from Left to Right
On 5:
Many lowers L arm and turns lady strongly L by rotating his hand to R from wrist until palm is turned outwards, giving lady's R arm a gental twist.
Lady continues to turn an extra 1/2 on RF allowing LF to cross loosely in front of RF (Spiral action) in Tandem position in front of Man.
On 6-8:
Lady may dance a forward lock or 3 small runs fwd.
At end of 8, Man turns lady to R to face him by rotating his hand slightly L from wrist.
Lady turns 1/4 R on LF to end in open position with LF back.
Follow with Chicken Walks, Simple spin from open position or other figures starting in open position. (Lady normally does a flick or oint ball change in place of 1-2 of Link.)

steps.action: Compact chasse LRL, turn 1/4 to R
Forward chasse RLR, end in Open Position
Turning chasse underarm RLR, 1/2 L turn
Backwards chasse LRL, end in Open Position
